privileged_info_summary: The task 'manufacturing_variant_bom_setup@1' configures a Bill of Materials (BoM) for the 'Ergo-Flex Desk' product template in Odoo with two product attributes: Edition (Standard, Pro) and Finish (Oak, White). Seven components are required: Desk Frame (Universal), Assembly Hardware Kit, Standard Motor Unit, Pro Heavy-Duty Motor Unit, Oak Desktop Board, White Desktop Board, and Cable Management Tray. All product data and components are synthetic, created during task setup via Odoo's XML-RPC API. The verifier checks that the BoM is correctly configured with variant-specific component restrictions and validates a test Manufacturing Order for the Pro, White variant.
